signals.npcLine: Crypto markets pulse feebly; shadows stir in digital veins.
signals.questPulse: Seek lost data nodes amid rising cyber dread.
signals.worldFeed: Market cap ticks up, but the vibe stays grim.
signals.clueEvent: Network flickers signal subtle rise, trust is scarce.

signals.npcLine: Watch KAT and BSB—ghost coins with hidden agendas.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate underworld ledgers; uncover silent players.
signals.worldFeed: Whispers of quiet trades among ghost tokens.
signals.clueEvent: Data sniffers detect spikes in obscure token flows.

signals.npcLine: Fear grips the net; trust fractures slowly.
signals.questPulse: Decode trust algorithms before the signal collapses.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment dives near bottom; players hesitate in shadows.
signals.clueEvent: Sentiment markers blink low; traders pull back.

signals.npcLine: Eth remains restless; heavy watchers tracking every move.
signals.questPulse: Shadow-run to extract vital Eth transaction secrets.
signals.worldFeed: ETH under surveillance; moves watched by unseen agents.
signals.clueEvent: ETH network heats up amid growing suspicion.

signals.npcLine: CHIP and PENGU chatter in dark cryptoloops.
signals.questPulse: Trace chatter sources; unlock hidden alliances.
signals.worldFeed: Lurkers pounce on low-tier tokens seeking profit shadows.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter hints at brewing token shifts.
